scope: PR-05 code lane: creation/character-select preview composed through the shared PlayerVisual render path. No reimplementation, no gameplay/save change, no image production.
summary: Character creation and character-select no longer describe a character in text alone or a colour swatch: both now draw the composed figure through the very same PlayerVisual the world uses. A new parent-independent apply_preview_character(character) takes a stored/edited character dict, derives its body and trim colours from appearance exactly like the live Player, resolves the body/appearance/look through the shared resolver, and supplies the worn gear from the character's own equipment slots (normalized just like the live equipped gear). With no Player attached, facing never overrides the preview's magnification and all swing state reads idle, so the shared _draw and the presentation snapshot are safe. The creation form shows a 6x figure that updates the instant you change species, body, look, or appearance; each select row shows that saved character at 3x with its gear. Because it is the same node and the same code, the preview cannot drift from the in-world result.
acceptance: Parentless preview snapshot equals the world snapshot for an identical character (pr05_preview_matches_world_render: diffs=[])
Equivalence is meaningful: the test character exercises body art, an appearance recolour, and four gear slots
Creation form shows a live figure updated on every figure-affecting selector; each select row shows its stored character
Presentation only: no equipment/gameplay/save change; no image production
Waited-GUI smoke 342/342; validator + capsule_doctor public_repo green; 07_character_create shot reviewed
validation: scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS (character creation/select preview reuses the render path; contract Preview Consumers)
waited-GUI Godot 4.6.1 smoke -> PASS 342/342 (fresh results file)
07_character_create shot -> composed figure matches the selectors
decisions: Reuse, do not reimplement: one parent-independent entry point (apply_preview_character) funnels into the existing set_character_visual + _draw so the preview and the world share the exact code path

Preview gear comes from the character's own equipment slots, normalized like the live equipped_dict() and filtered to the shared DRAWN_GEAR_SLOTS, so visible gear matches the world for the same equipment
Appearance -> body/trim colour derivation mirrors Player.apply_character so identical inputs resolve to identical colours

Wiki HTML/MD regeneration was deliberately excluded: generate_wiki.py surfaced ~180 files of pre-existing drift (stale Generated dates, missing nav cards, a new authority_sigil page) unrelated to PR-05; VARIABLE_MATRIX.html therefore lags its .md until a dedicated wiki-regen pass
risks: fq09u1_live_clip_switch cold-profile flakiness persists in the music lane (passed this run)
docs/VARIABLE_MATRIX.html is one PR-05 row behind docs/VARIABLE_MATRIX.md until the wiki is regenerated in its own pass
next_action: PR-06 (Character HUD rebuild on runtime children against the PR-02 contract + existing native chrome).
